title: AWS waiters should be used instead of custom polling loops
description: Custom polling loops can lead to inefficiencies and error-prone code. Use AWS SDK waiters instead.
message: Avoid custom polling loops, use AWS SDK waiters.
why_is_this_an_issue: Custom polling loops can lead to inefficiencies and error-prone code.

checks.message: Custom polling loop detected. Avoid custom polling loops, use AWS SDK waiters.
